data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Template A/B testing' as part of the SMS Reminder System. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or state checks that confirm the implementation or functionality of A/B testing templates. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the expected result was not met and no supporting evidence was found to confirm this feature's existence.
gaps: No evidence of implementation or functionality for Template A/B testing.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the implementation of Template A/B testing.
